title: FORM:-  START UP & END OF SHIFT CHECKLIST
category: 3. EP6 START & End of shift checklist

items.question: OE Deploy as per skill matrix
Check PM status of Workstation/Machine (Cycle : Monthly)
Check the PM status of running model tool/fixture (Should be within due date mentioned)
Availability of rejection bin/Identification tags ( Red/Yellow/Green)

sections.title: SHIFT START UP CHECK LIST :- - Poka Yoke Validation

items.specified_value:
For NOT OK Condition : Barcode will not get generated if specified no.of Bolts/Screws are not tightened on Shroud/Assembly with required Torque.  
For OK Condition : Barcode will get generated if specified no.of Bolts/Screws are tightened on Shroud/Assembly with required Torque. | OK / NOT OK

items.question: Barcode scanning (As per model)
items.specified_value:
For NOT OK Condition :Put the part on fixture Press Cycle Start button Gun will not Start if Radiator&Condenser Barcode not scanned by Scanner.(Condenser Barcode-Only for W153/Altroz Rad)
For OK Condition :Put the part on fixture Press Cycle Start button Gun will Start if Radiator&Condenser Barcode scanned by Scanner.(Condenser Barcode-Only for W153/Altroz Rad) | OK / NOT OK

items.question: Tank Metal Sleeve & Sealing Foam Presence POKAYOKE (Only for W153)
items.specified_value:
Not ok Condition-Put the Without Grommet and Metal Sleeve part on Fixture and Start Cycle Start button Scanning Display not Showing in Scada and Gun will Not Activated
ok Condition-Put the With Grommet and Metal Sleeve part on Fixture and Start Cycle Start button Scanning Display Showing in Scada and After barcode Scanning  Gun will Not Activated and Cycle will Complete | OK / NOT OK

sections.title: END OF SHIFT CHECK POINTS :- - Poka Yoke Validation

items.question:
Module Assembly locking Bolts/screws Gun torque verification. Torque (3.5 to 4.5) NM
[for S201/S215 GSL/DSL and W153 - 2 Bolts, 
ALTROZ- 8 Bolts]
Note : For other models fill Not Applicable (NA)
items.specified_value:
For NOT OK Condition : Barcode will not get generated if specified no.of Bolts/Screws are not tightened on Shroud/Assembly with required Torque.  
For OK Condition : Barcode will get generated if specified no.of Bolts/Screws are tightened on Shroud/Assembly with required Torque. | OK / NOT OK

items.question: Barcode scanning (As per model)
items.specified_value:
For NOT OK Condition :Put the part on fixture Press Cycle Start button Gun will not Start if Radiator&Condenser Barcode not scanned by Scanner.(Condenser Barcode-Only for W153/Altroz Rad)
For OK Condition :Put the part on fixture Press Cycle Start button Gun will Start if Radiator&Condenser Barcode scanned by Scanner.(Condenser Barcode-Only for W153/Altroz Rad) | OK / NOT OK

items.question: Tank Metal Sleeve & Sealing Foam Presence POKAYOKE (Only for W153)
items.specified_value:
Not ok Condition-Put the Without Grommet and Metal Sleeve part on Fixture and Start Cycle Start button Scanning Display not Showing in Scada and Gun will Not Activated
ok Condition-Put the With Grommet and Metal Sleeve part on Fixture and Start Cycle Start button Scanning Display Showing in Scada and After barcode Scanning  Gun will Not Activated and Cycle will Complete | OK / NOT OK

closing_fields.label: SHIFT START UP CHECK LIST :- - NAME & SIGN OF PERSON ATTENDING
SHIFT START UP CHECK LIST :- - NAME & SIGN OF APPROVING CELL COORDINATOR
END OF SHIFT CHECK POINTS :- - NAME & SIGN OF PERSON ATTENDING
END OF SHIFT CHECK POINTS :- - NAME & SIGN OF APPROVING CELL COORDINATOR

notes: NAME OF MACHINE/STATION :- Radiator Assembly Cell 4- MODULE ASSEMBLY
FORM:- START UP & END OF SHIFT CHECKLIST

A)Condition for StartUp :-
1] At Start of shift /End of shift
2] Model &/or Set up change
3] Pokayoke Failure, corrected & production resumed
4] If poka yoke bypassed and production continued as per alternate poka yoke bypass document
5] More than 4 hour Planned shut down
6) During Abnormal Situations (6a-Emergency Alarm / 6b-Power Failure / 6c-Machine or Tool Breakdown - more than 45 mins / 6d-Inspection Guage or Instrument breakdown or fallen down)
B)Reactivity Rule:- If any NC is found inform to CC/ Shift Incharge , Initiate actions for correction & After closure of NC treat the shift as a fresh shift , Start checking from the begining of the check points in the next column.
C) Guideline for Supervisor's Approval: Supervisor need to do tick mark ( √ ) after verification of highlighted points.
